description: You are an SRE at AcmeCorp. A compliance audit flagged three production containers for filesystem drift: 'acme-webserver', 'acme-appserver', and 'acme-taskrunner'. Detect all unauthorized changes in each container and extract legitimate configuration files to '~/projects/container-configs/webserver/', '~/projects/container-configs/appserver/', and '~/projects/container-configs/taskrunner/'. Write a drift report to '~/Desktop/drift_report.txt' documenting and classifying the changes. Stop the drifted containers and deploy clean replacements named 'acme-webserver-clean', 'acme-appserver-clean', and 'acme-taskrunner-clean' using the original base images and mounting the preserved configurations. Login: user ga, password password123.
